title: taraxacum × columnare
intro: Taraxacum × columnare, also known as the upright dandelion, is a sterile hybrid plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its upright growth habit. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum × columnare include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it beneficial for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include improved digestion, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum × columnare can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
